PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF PERSON AND ESTATE, CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2005, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER, ASSESSMENT FEE OF $690.00 ; ORDER HELD BY COURT TO MAKE MODIFICATIONS. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING; COURT INCLUDES ATTACHMENT 20 TO ORDER, WHICH ORDERS COURT-APPOINTED COUNSEL JULIA J. SPIKES MAY ASSIST CONSERVATEE WILLIAM LEWIS IN THE EXECUTION OF A MEDICAL DIRECTIVE LIMITED TO A STATEMENT OF MR. LEWIS' WISHES REGARDING END OF LIFE DECISIONS. THE CONSERVATOR SHALL COMPLY WITH THE CONSERVATEE'S WISHES IF THE CONSRVATOR RECEIVES SUCH A DULY EXECUTED MEDICAL DIRECTIVE. COPY SENT TO MS.
